messages.content:
[Product Release Video] We’re launching LearnFlow AI, an AI-powered tool that helps instructional designers automatically generate storyboards and training videos from text prompts. The product’s main features include instant scene generation, voiceover integration, and editable scripts. Key benefits: saves 80% of production time, maintains brand tone, and supports SCORM export.
Target audience: corporate learning teams, customer education professionals, and eLearning agencies.
Tone: modern, confident, and inspiring — focus on how LearnFlow AI transforms instructional design from a manual process into a creative, AI-assisted workflow.
Call to action: “Start your first storyboard for free.”

{
  "screens": [
    {
      "screen_number": 1,
      "screen_title": "Hook: The Future of Instructional Design",
      "voiceover_text": "Imagine transforming hours of manual instructional design into minutes of creative, AI-powered workflow. Welcome to LearnFlow AI.",
      "visual_description": "Dynamic animation of a cluttered desk morphing into a sleek digital interface, symbolizing transformation.",
      "screen_type": "stock-video",
      "target_duration_sec": 8
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 2,
      "screen_title": "Problem: Manual Storyboarding is Slow",
      "voiceover_text": "Traditional storyboarding and training video creation is slow, repetitive, and often drains creative energy from instructional designers.",
      "visual_description": "Split-screen: frustrated designer with sticky notes and paper on one side, slow progress bar on the other.",
      "screen_type": "stock-video",
      "target_duration_sec": 8
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 3,
      "screen_title": "Introducing LearnFlow AI",
      "voiceover_text": "Meet LearnFlow AI, the tool that automates storyboard and training video creation from a simple text prompt.",
      "visual_description": "Logo animation for LearnFlow AI, followed by a quick reveal of the product dashboard.",
      "screen_type": "text-overlay",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 4,
      "screen_title": "Instant Scene Generation",
      "voiceover_text": "Just enter your learning objectives, and watch as LearnFlow AI instantly generates scenes tailored to your content.",
      "visual_description": "Screencast: User types objectives, scenes auto-populate in storyboard timeline.",
      "screen_type": "screencast",
      "target_duration_sec": 7
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 5,
      "screen_title": "Voiceover Integration",
      "voiceover_text": "Add professional voiceovers in seconds—no recording booth or editing required. Choose a style that matches your brand.",
      "visual_description": "UI demo: Selecting a voice style, instant playback of generated narration.",
      "screen_type": "screencast",
      "target_duration_sec": 7
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 6,
      "screen_title": "Editable Scripts for Flexibility",
      "voiceover_text": "Edit scripts directly in the platform. Fine-tune every word to ensure your message is clear and on-brand.",
      "visual_description": "UI: User edits script text, preview updates in real time.",
      "screen_type": "screencast",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 7,
      "screen_title": "SCORM Export for Seamless Delivery",
      "voiceover_text": "Export your finished training in SCORM format, ready for any LMS. Deliver learning at scale, effortlessly.",
      "visual_description": "UI: Clicks 'Export as SCORM', download animation, LMS dashboard preview.",
      "screen_type": "screencast",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 8,
      "screen_title": "Save 80% of Production Time",
      "voiceover_text": "LearnFlow AI cuts production time by 80 percent, letting you focus on creativity and impact, not repetitive tasks.",
      "visual_description": "Animated timer rapidly counts down, scenes auto-generate, designer smiles at completed project.",
      "screen_type": "stock-video",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 9,
      "screen_title": "Maintain Your Brand Tone",
      "voiceover_text": "Keep your unique brand voice consistent across every training module, with customizable templates and voice options.",
      "visual_description": "UI: Brand color picker, logo upload, voice style selection, preview of branded storyboard.",
      "screen_type": "screencast",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 10,
      "screen_title": "Who’s It For?",
      "voiceover_text": "Perfect for corporate learning teams, customer education professionals, and eLearning agencies ready to scale their impact.",
      "visual_description": "Montage: diverse professionals collaborating, reviewing storyboards, launching training on laptops.",
      "screen_type": "stock-video",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 11,
      "screen_title": "Transform Your Workflow",
      "voiceover_text": "Shift from manual, time-consuming processes to a creative, AI-assisted workflow that inspires innovation.",
      "visual_description": "Before-and-after: slow manual process transitions to fast, dynamic AI-powered workflow.",
      "screen_type": "text-overlay",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    },
    {
      "screen_number": 12,
      "screen_title": "Call to Action",
      "voiceover_text": "Ready to revolutionize your instructional design? Start your first storyboard for free with LearnFlow AI.",
      "visual_description": "Bold CTA button: 'Start your first storyboard for free.' LearnFlow AI logo and website URL.",
      "screen_type": "cta",
      "target_duration_sec": 6
    }
  ]
}
